message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Resident" as Resident
participant "WeResident" as WeResident
participant "WeID" as WeID
participant "WeService" as WeService

== Provider Login Into Provider App ==

Resident -> WeResident : Send username:password /login

alt Provider already exist
    WeResident -> WeID : Get Token by username:password\n/oauth/authorize
    WeID -> WeResident : Return Token to WeResident
end

WeResident -> Resident : Return {"token": "jwt-token"}

== Provider Query/Search Service ==

Resident -> WeService : Query services including token\n /weservices/services\n Header\n   Authorization: Bear **jwt-token**

note left
Query Service schema
{"query":"string","status":12}
end note

alt above token is valid
    WeService -> WeID : verify token
    WeID -> WeService : 200
    WeService -> Resident : Response services data

    note left
Service Data Array schema
{[{"id":"string","company":"string","name":"string","rate":4.2,"image":"image.png"},{}],
"total":10,"currentPage":1,"perPage":5}
    end note

else Token is expired/invalid
    WeService -> WeID : verify token
    WeID -> WeService : 400
    WeService -> Resident : Response 401 status
end

== Create Order(Request) ==

Resident -> WeService : Create Service\n POST: /weservices/service/{serviceID}/order

note left
Order Request schema
{"resident":"$userID",
"service":"$serviceID",
"pricingModel":{},
"noteDetail":"string",
"address":"string",
"schedule":Time}
end note

WeService -> WeID : verify token
WeID -> WeService : 200

WeService -> Resident : Response Service Data(JSON)

Resident -> WeService : Comment(chat) in Order\n POST: /weservices/order/{orderID}/comment

note left
Comment Data
{"content":"string"}
end note

WeService -> WeID : verify token
WeID -> WeService : 200

WeService -> Resident : 200

@enduml
```
